title: Resting Blåhaj
description: Have a cute little Blåhaj on your head!
body:
## Resting Blåhaj [CIT]
### Have a cute shark friend on your head!
![A blue shark plushie (Blåhaj) sitting on top of a minecraft character](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d19755c0ba8087ef4bbb285cc82b88e7a9063807.webp)
![A blue shark plushie (Blåhaj) sitting on top of a minecraft character](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b942b50025f3a59e28b1a53eb0d9546b8c4853c1.webp)

You need to have the CIT mod installed. Then rename a carved pumpking to "Blåhaj" while the resource pack is loaded :3
